Name: Spaghetti Sort
Author: A. K. Dewdney
Description: Spaghetti sort is a linear-time, analog algorithm for sorting a sequence of items, introduced by A. K. Dewdney. It requires a parallel processor or a physical analog device to achieve its O(n) time complexity. In software, it is simulated by finding the maximum element and removing it, which takes O(n²) time.
Algorithm: async function sort(){const a=[...array];for(let r=0;r<array.length-1;r++){let n=0;for(let i=1;i<a.length;i++){await compare(array.indexOf(a[i]),array.indexOf(a[n]));if(a[i]>a[n])n=i}let maxVal=a[n];if(a.splice(n,1),swap(array.indexOf(maxVal),array.length-r - 1),await sleep(),firstRun)return}}
